compounds.frequency: 1-2x per day loading, then 1-2x per week maintenance

benefits.description: Tanning effect; finds MT1 more tolerable than MT2

protocol_notes: Recommends 250-500mcg 1-2x per day for loading phase until desired tan achieved, then 1-2x per week to maintain. Suggests dosing in morning ~30 minutes before sun exposure. Notes 250mcg is a conservative starting dose; suggests 100mcg for a few days is also viable. Personally finds MT1 more tolerable than MT2.
